name: ACMP
description: CALM architecture for the Authentication Credential Management Platform based on the current requirements baseline, FRS, and technical specification.

nodes.name: Authentication Credential Management Platform
nodes.description: Central internal platform for service and client registration, credential lifecycle management, HMAC issuance, authorization metadata, and audit governance.

nodes.name: Authorized Administrator
nodes.description: Authorized internal administrator who manages clients, credentials, scopes, revocation, rotation, and related platform actions.

nodes.name: Admin Web Portal
nodes.description: Internal AdminLTE-based web portal used to administer services, credentials, and platform configuration.

nodes.name: Credential Management API
nodes.description: Management API that supports client registration, credential issuance, rotation, revocation, package issuance, and audit-related operations.

nodes.name: Protected Recipient Service
nodes.description: Internal protected service or business API that validates inbound HMAC requests and enforces credential scope and permission checks.

nodes.name: Client Service
nodes.description: Internal client service that signs outbound HMAC requests when calling protected services.

nodes.name: MiniKMS
nodes.description: Internal cryptographic component used for HMAC secret generation, envelope encryption, decryption, and key versioning.

nodes.name: Credential Persistence Store
nodes.description: SQL Server or PostgreSQL data store holding service and client records, credential metadata, HMAC detail records, and audit data.

nodes.name: Encrypted Credential Package
nodes.description: Encrypted file artifact issued per KeyId for recipient-side HMAC validation in EncryptedFile mode.

nodes.name: Encrypted Client Credential Package
nodes.description: Encrypted file artifact issued per KeyId for client-side outbound HMAC signing.
